name: team-brain
description: Shared team memory for Claude Code — auto-recall every turn, passive capture of durable learnings, and document ingest, against a self-hosted podbrain server.

brain_url.title: Brain URL
brain_url.description: Your team's brain, e.g. https://my-brain.sprites.app (no trailing slash)

brain_secret.title: Brain secret
brain_secret.description: The team bearer secret (ask your brain admin; on the brain box it's ~/.agentmemory/team_secret.txt)

user_email.title: Your email (attribution)
user_email.description: Stamped on memories you save (—[saved by …]). Optional — falls back to git config user.email.
